name: Cal-ITP Data Infra (Nix + DinD)
onCreateCommand: sudo mkdir -p /etc/nix && echo 'experimental-features = nix-command flakes' | sudo tee -a /etc/nix/nix.conf && if [ -x $(command -v zsh) ]; then sudo mkdir -p /etc/zsh && echo 'eval "$(direnv hook zsh)"' | sudo tee -a /etc/zsh/zshrc; fi && if [ -x $(command -v fish) ]; then sudo mkdir -p /etc/fish/conf.d && echo 'direnv hook fish | source' | sudo tee /etc/fish/conf.d/direnv.fish; fi
